generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had strong domestic security powers? Crime was down, and we felt safe. Now, with all these new 'rights' activists pushing back, our communities are less secure. We can't afford to be soft on security. The old ways worked - let's bring them back before it's too late. #SecurityFirst #BringBackOrder
